word: H5904 - עִיר נָחָשׁ - ʻÎyr Nâchâsh - eer naw-khawsh' - Irnahash

sections.paragraph:
Original: עיר נחשׁ

Transliteration: ‛ı̂yr nâchâsh

Phonetic: eer naw-khawsh'

BDB Definition:

Ir-nahash = "city of a serpent"
  1. a Judaite

Origin: from H5892 and H5175

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
